title: First Steps in Water Seven
description: The crew splits up in Water Seven, exchanging treasure and discovering the city’s craftsmen, money, and hidden dangers.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro, Sanji. The crew splits up in Water Seven, exchanging treasure and discovering the city’s craftsmen, money, and hidden dangers.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What awaits them in water seven

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What if we run into robbers!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Is that how you think of me!!?

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Don't know. Is it a bulldog?

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Wait! Find out what it is first!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Okay. Please make it extra crispy.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: What the hell are you talking about!?

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: What!? You came here following the log!?

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: wow.... that's amazing. Though that probably means...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: that you don't know what bulls are.

summary: The crew splits up in Water Seven, exchanging treasure and discovering the city’s craftsmen, money, and hidden dangers.
